tiers.label: Bombs / Must Pick
tiers.description: The best cards in the format. These win games on their own.

cards.name: Trystan's Command
cards.reason: Extremely flexible and powerful graveyard/board interaction.

cards.name: Ashling's Command
cards.reason: Massive tempo swing with removal and card advantage modes.

cards.name: Champions of the Perfect
cards.reason: The best 'Behold' payoff; provides an insurmountable board presence.

cards.name: Gloom Ripper
cards.reason: Recursive threat that dominates combat and scales with the graveyard.

cards.name: Aurora Awakener
cards.reason: Massive stats and game-ending potential if not answered immediately.

tiers.label: Premium / Strong Pick
tiers.description: High-power rares and the best uncommons that pull you into a color.

cards.name: Champions of the Shoal
cards.reason: Elite card draw and board management for Blue decks.

cards.name: Brigid, Clachan's Heart
cards.reason: A powerhouse in GW Kithkin, providing protection and aggression.

cards.name: Sygg, Wanderwine Wisdom
cards.reason: Key engine for Merfolk decks that protects your board.

cards.name: Curious Colossus
cards.reason: A board-altering flyer that rewards wide board states.

cards.name: Kinbinding
cards.reason: Premium removal that leverages the typal synergies of the set.

tiers.label: Good Playables
tiers.description: Solid cards that reward you for drafting their specific archetype.

cards.name: Rimekin Recluse
cards.reason: A 3/2 Man-o'-War on an absurd rate; premium tempo piece.

cards.name: Eclipsed Elf
cards.reason: Premier payoff for Elves that digs for your best cards.

cards.name: Eclipsed Merrow
cards.reason: Essential for Merfolk consistency and board presence.

cards.name: Morcant's Eyes
cards.reason: Strong recursion engine for the Elf archetype.

cards.name: Sear
cards.reason: Efficient red removal that handles most threats in the format.

tiers.label: Filler / Decent
tiers.description: Standard cards to round out your 23 playables.

cards.name: Temporal Cleansing
cards.reason: Solid interactive spell that gets better with Convoke.

cards.name: Blight Rot
cards.reason: Efficient removal that enables -1/-1 counter synergies.

cards.name: Gangly Stompling
cards.reason: Versatile changeling that fills slots in any typal or vivid deck.

cards.name: Cinder Strike
cards.reason: Basic removal that supports the Blight mechanic.

tiers.label: Sideboard / Avoid
tiers.description: Highly situational cards or those with power levels too low for main deck play.

cards.name: Mornsong Aria
cards.reason: Too slow and low impact for the current format pace.

cards.name: Perfect Intimidation
cards.reason: Extremely narrow; only useful in very specific board stalls.

cards.name: Mirrormind Crown
cards.reason: Requires too much setup to be a reliable value piece.

cards.name: Prismatic Undercurrents
cards.reason: The rate is too poor for a rare slot in limited.
